title: SimCorp Dimension Portfolio
description: Schema for a portfolio entity in the SimCorp Integration Model (SIM). Portfolios represent investment portfolios managed within SimCorp Dimension, supporting multi-asset class holdings across the Investment Book of Record (IBOR). Based on the SimCorp Dimension data model documented at thesim.dev and simcorp.com.

portfolioId.description: Unique internal identifier for the portfolio within SimCorp Dimension

portfolioCode.description: Short alphanumeric code uniquely identifying the portfolio

portfolioName.description: Full descriptive name of the portfolio

portfolioType.description: Classification of the portfolio by its operational role

portfolioStatus.description: Current lifecycle status of the portfolio

baseCurrency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the portfolio base currency used for valuation and reporting

inceptionDate.description: Date the portfolio was established and began tracking positions

terminationDate.description: Date the portfolio was closed or terminated, null if still active

legalEntity.description: The legal entity or organization that owns the portfolio

investmentManager.description: Name or identifier of the portfolio manager or management team responsible

custodian.description: The custodian bank or institution holding the portfolio assets

benchmark.description: The benchmark portfolio or index used for performance comparison

benchmarkCode.description: Code identifying the benchmark portfolio or index

investmentStrategy.description: Description of the investment strategy or mandate governing the portfolio

assetClasses.description: Asset classes that the portfolio is authorized to hold

portfolioHierarchy.description: Hierarchical structure placing this portfolio within a portfolio tree or organizational grouping

parentPortfolioCode.description: Code of the parent portfolio in a master-sleeve or composite structure

level.description: Depth level within the portfolio hierarchy, where 0 is the top-level

groupCode.description: Code identifying the portfolio group or organizational unit

positions.description: Current holdings or positions within the portfolio from the Investment Book of Record (IBOR)

complianceRules.description: Investment compliance rules and constraints applied to the portfolio

valuationSummary.description: Summary valuation data for the portfolio as of the last valuation date

valuationDate.description: Date of the most recent portfolio valuation

totalMarketValue.description: Total market value of the portfolio in base currency

totalCostValue.description: Total cost basis of the portfolio in base currency

cashBalance.description: Total cash balance across all cash accounts in base currency

unrealizedGainLoss.description: Total unrealized gain or loss in base currency

netAssetValue.description: Net asset value (NAV) of the portfolio in base currency

accountingMethod.description: The accounting method used for the portfolio in the Accounting Book of Record (ABOR)

reportingCurrency.description: Currency used for client reporting if different from base currency

classifications.description: User-defined and system classification attributes for the portfolio

customProperties.description: User-defined custom fields extending the standard portfolio attributes

createdDate.description: Timestamp when the portfolio record was created in SimCorp Dimension

modifiedDate.description: Timestamp when the portfolio record was last modified

Position.title: Portfolio Position
Position.description: A holding or position within a SimCorp Dimension portfolio, representing a quantity of an instrument held at a given status level within the IBOR.

positionId.description: Unique identifier for the position record

instrumentCode.description: Code identifying the instrument held in this position

quantity.description: Number of units, shares, or nominal amount held

settlementQuantity.description: Quantity at the settled position level

marketValue.description: Current market value of the position in portfolio base currency

costValue.description: Cost basis of the position in portfolio base currency

accruedInterest.description: Accrued interest for fixed income positions

unrealizedGainLoss.description: Unrealized profit or loss on the position

weight.description: Position weight as a percentage of total portfolio market value

positionDate.description: Date for which the position is reported

statusLevel.description: Transaction status level defining the position view, reflecting the front-to-back lifecycle stage

positionCurrency.description: ISO 4217 currency code of the position

exchangeRate.description: Exchange rate applied to convert from position currency to portfolio base currency

TransactionStatusLevel.title: Transaction Status Level
TransactionStatusLevel.description: Defines the status levels through which a transaction progresses in SimCorp Dimension, from entry through to final settlement. These status levels serve as position drivers.
